parameters.name: winop
parameters.label: Window Operator
parameters.description: Specifies the operator the window will display.

parameters.name: title
parameters.label: Title
parameters.description: Specify the window's title.

parameters.name: justifyoffsetto
parameters.label: Justisy and Offset to...
parameters.description: All the positioning parameters below are done relative to the location you specify here. Your window can span more than the specified 'area', it's just used as the reference for positioning. : When us

parameters.name: ignoretaskbar
parameters.label: Ignore Taskbar
parameters.description: The Windows taskBar is ignored when this option is 'On'. When off the taskbar is accounted for so position and sizing will not cover it up.

parameters.name: display
parameters.label: Display
parameters.description: Specify the display index when is set to .

parameters.name: justifyh
parameters.label: Justify Horizontal
parameters.description: Aligns the window horizontally with the monitor or bounds of all monitors.

parameters.name: justifyv
parameters.label: Justify Vertical
parameters.description: Aligns the window vertically with the monitor or bounds of all monitors.

parameters.name: single
parameters.label: Shift to Single Display
parameters.description: This menu has options for shifting the opening window. You can either shift to a single display or shift to the display the cursor is over when the window opens.

parameters.name: dpiscaling
parameters.label: DPI Scaling
parameters.description: Options for managing DPI scaling on high DPI monitors. To inspect a monitor's DPI scaling setting, you can use the and refer to the column.

parameters.name: size
parameters.label: Opening Size
parameters.description: Determines how the size of the window is determined.

parameters.name: winw
parameters.label: Width
parameters.description: The width of the window when Opening Size parameter is set to Custom.

parameters.name: winh
parameters.label: Height
parameters.description: The height of the window when Opening Size parameter is set to Custom.

parameters.name: update
parameters.label: Update Settings from Window
parameters.description: When the window is open you can reposition and resize it. Clicking this button will then read its current windows settings and apply them to the parameters above.

parameters.name: borders
parameters.label: Borders
parameters.description: Controls whether or not the window contains borders and a title bar.

parameters.name: bordersinsize
parameters.label: Include Borders in Size
parameters.description: When 'On' the borders are included in the size of the window.

parameters.name: alwaysontop
parameters.label: Always on Top
parameters.description: Controls whether or not the window always sits atop other floating windows.

parameters.name: cursorvisible
parameters.label: Cursor Visible
parameters.description: Controls whether or not the cursor remains visible when over this window.

parameters.name: constraincursor
parameters.label: Constrain Cursor
parameters.description: Control the area in which the cursor can operate.

parameters.name: cursordisplay
parameters.label: Cursor Display
parameters.description: Specify display index, when cursor is constrained to a specific display.

parameters.name: interact
parameters.label: Allow Viewer Interaction
parameters.description: Enables interactions with the operator specified in the Operator parameter.

parameters.name: allowminimize
parameters.label: Allow Minimize
parameters.description: Enables the window to be minimized in the taskbar (dock in macOS).

parameters.name: windowpixelformat
parameters.label: Window Pixel Format
parameters.description: Controls the pixel format of the window that is created. This affects both the bit depth (8, 10, 16 bit) and the color space the window will given the content as. This settings only works if a working

parameters.name: vsyncmode
parameters.label: V-Sync Mode
parameters.description: Controls how the window is updated with regards to V-Sync. Enabled means it will update in sync with the monitors refresh which avoids tearing and lost frames. Disabled means it can update at any poin

parameters.name: drawwindow
parameters.label: Draw Window
parameters.description: When disabled the window will not update it's contents at all. Useful for processes that arn't doing rendering such as Audio or networking processes, or for when using VR devices.

parameters.name: hwframelock
parameters.label: Hardware Frame-Lock
parameters.description: Use of this feature in the is deprecated. It is highly recommended that be used for Lock. This feature provides multi frame-lock sync using sync cards. For more information, see and .

parameters.name: performance
parameters.label: Open as Perform Window
parameters.description: Opens this in . Any can be set as default Perform (opens using F1 shortcut) using the . This button allows you to open this in without changing what is currently selected as the 'default' Perform .

parameters.name: winopen
parameters.label: Open as Separate Window
parameters.description: Opens this as its own floating window, not as the Perform . Useful for things such as dialog boxes, popups, or testing, but should not be used for putting final rendered content to outputs. Use a sing

parameters.name: winclose
parameters.label: Close
parameters.description: Closes the window, if it's open.

parameters.name: setperform
parameters.label: Set as Perform Window
parameters.description: Permanently changes the Perform setting in the Placement dialog to this window.

parameters.name: opendialog
parameters.label: Window Placement Dialog
parameters.description: A shortcut to open the Placement dialog.

parameters.name: includedialog
parameters.label: Include in Placement Dialog
parameters.description: When 'On' this will be displayed in the Placement .

parameters.name: blocksleep
parameters.label: Prevent Display Sleep
parameters.description: When 'On' the display will not go to sleep regardless of the system's power and sleep settings.

parameters.name: closeescape
parameters.label: Close on Escape Key
parameters.description: When 'On' pressing the escape key over this window will close it. : Shift-Escape will always close it, whether this parameter is on or off.

parameters.name: reinitextensions
parameters.label: Re-Init Extensions
parameters.description: Recompile all extension objects. Normally extension objects are compiled only when they are referenced and their definitions have changed.

parameters.name: initextonstart
parameters.label: Init Extensions On Start
parameters.description: Perform a Re-Init automatically when TouchDEsigner Starts

parameters.name: ext
parameters.label: Extension
parameters.description: Sequence of info for creating extensions on this component

parameters.name: ext0object
parameters.label: Object
parameters.description: A number of class instances that can be attached to the component.

parameters.name: ext0name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: Optional name to search by, instead of the instance class name.

parameters.name: ext0promote
parameters.label: Promote
parameters.description: Controls whether or not the extensions are visible directly at the component level, or must be accessed through the member.  Example: vs

parameters.name: parentshortcut
parameters.label: Parent Shortcut
parameters.description: Specifies a name you can use anywhere inside the component as the path to that component. See .

parameters.name: opshortcut
parameters.label: Global OP Shortcut
parameters.description: Specifies a name you can use anywhere at all as the path to that component. See .

parameters.name: iop
parameters.label: Internal OP
parameters.description: Sequence header for internal operators.

parameters.name: iop0shortcut
parameters.label: Shortcut
parameters.description: Specifies a name you can use anywhere inside the component as a path to "Internal " below. See .

parameters.name: iop0op
parameters.label: OP
parameters.description: The path to the Internal OP inside this component. See .

parameters.name: opviewer
parameters.label: Operator Viewer
parameters.description: Select which operator's node viewer to use when the Node View parameter above is set to Operator .

parameters.name: enablecloning
parameters.label: Enable Cloning
parameters.description: Control if the OP should be actively cloneing. Turning this off causes this node to stop cloning it's 'Clone Master'.

parameters.name: enablecloningpulse
parameters.label: Enable Cloning Pulse
parameters.description: Instantaneously clone the contents.

parameters.name: clone
parameters.label: Clone Master
parameters.description: to a component used as the Master .

parameters.name: loadondemand
parameters.label: Load on Demand
parameters.description: Loads the component into memory only when required. Good to use for components that are not always used in the project.

parameters.name: enableexternaltox
parameters.label: Enable External .tox
parameters.description: When on (default), the external file will be loaded when the starts and the contents of the will match that of the external . This can be turned off to avoid loading from the referenced external on st

parameters.name: enableexternaltoxpulse
parameters.label: Enable External .tox Pulse
parameters.description: This button will re-load from the external file (if present).

parameters.name: externaltox
parameters.label: External .tox Path
parameters.description: to a file on disk which will source the component's contents upon start of a . This allows for components to contain networks that can be updated independently. If the file can not be found, whatever

parameters.name: reloadbuiltin
parameters.label: Reload Built-In Parameters
parameters.description: When this checkbox is enabled, the values of the component's built-in parameters are reloaded when the is reloaded. This only affects top-level parameters on the component, all parameters on nodes ins

parameters.name: savebackup
parameters.label: Save Backup of External
parameters.description: When this checkbox is enabled, a backup copy of the component specified by the External parameter is saved in the file.  This backup copy will be used if the External can not be found. This may happen

parameters.name: subcompname

parameters.name: relpath
parameters.label: Relative File Path Behavior
parameters.description: Set whether the child file paths within this are relative to the itself or the , or inherit from parent.

parameters.name: nodeview
parameters.label: Nodeview
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: winoffsety
parameters.label: Winoffsety
parameters.description: Horizontal offset applied to window after justifying.
